'''鈭歾-k-g''' ('''kazakag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vouch|vouch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vouch|vouch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-k-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazakag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizakag|thizakag]] || [[word:jizakag|jizakag]] || [[word:shizakag|shizakag]] || [[word:kizakag|kizakag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzakag|thuthuzakag]] || [[word:jujuzakag|jujuzakag]] || [[word:shushuzakag|shushuzakag]] || [[word:kukuzakag|kukuzakag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzakag|thuzakag]] || [[word:juzakag|juzakag]] || [[word:shuzakag|shuzakag]] || [[word:kuzakag|kuzakag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzakag|thuzakag]] || [[word:juzakag|juzakag]] || [[word:shuzakag|shuzakag]] || [[word:kuzakag|kuzakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezakag|thezakag]] || [[word:jezakag|jezakag]] || [[word:shezakag|shezakag]] || [[word:kezakag|kezakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozakag|thothozakag]] || [[word:jojozakag|jojozakag]] || [[word:shoshozakag|shoshozakag]] || [[word:kokozakag|kokozakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozakag|thozakag]] || [[word:jozakag|jozakag]] || [[word:shozakag|shozakag]] || [[word:kozakag|kozakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozakag|thozakag]] || [[word:jozakag|jozakag]] || [[word:shozakag|shozakag]] || [[word:kozakag|kozakag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]] || [[word:zakag|zakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zakag|th忙zakag]] || [[word:j忙zakag|j忙zakag]] || [[word:sh忙zakag|sh忙zakag]] || [[word:k忙zakag|k忙zakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazakag|thathazakag]] || [[word:jajazakag|jajazakag]] || [[word:shashazakag|shashazakag]] || [[word:kakazakag|kakazakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazakag|thazakag]] || [[word:jazakag|jazakag]] || [[word:shazakag|shazakag]] || [[word:kazakag|kazakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazakag|thazakag]] || [[word:jazakag|jazakag]] || [[word:shazakag|shazakag]] || [[word:kazakag|kazakag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazakag|shazakag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazakag|goshazakag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazakag|gokishazakag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazakagn眉|shazakagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazakagnkn眉|goshazakagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazakagn眉|gokishazakagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazakagsh毛|shazakagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazakagnksh毛|goshazakagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazakagsh毛|gokishazakagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazakagro|shazakagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazakagnkro|goshazakagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazakagro|gokishazakagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazakagmu|shazakagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazakagnkmu|goshazakagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazakagmu|gokishazakagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazakagsher|shazakagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazakagnksher|goshazakagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazakagsher|gokishazakagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazakagng|shazakagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazakagnkng|goshazakagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazakagng|gokishazakagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazakagya|shazakagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazakagnkya|goshazakagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazakagya|gokishazakagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazakagyam|shazakagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazakagnkyam|goshazakagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazakagyam|gokishazakagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazakagn眉sh毛|shazakagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazakagnkn眉sh毛|goshazakagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazakagn眉sh毛|gokishazakagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazakagn眉ro|shazakagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazakagnkn眉ro|goshazakagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazakagn眉ro|gokishazakagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazakagn眉mu|shazakagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazakagnkn眉mu|goshazakagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazakagn眉mu|gokishazakagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazakagsh毛n眉|shazakagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazakagnksh毛n眉|goshazakagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazakagsh毛n眉|gokishazakagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazakagsh毛ro|shazakagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazakagnksh毛ro|goshazakagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazakagsh毛ro|gokishazakagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazakagsh毛mu|shazakagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazakagnksh毛mu|goshazakagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazakagsh毛mu|gokishazakagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazakagron眉|shazakagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazakagnkron眉|goshazakagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazakagron眉|gokishazakagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazakagrosh毛|shazakagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazakagnkrosh毛|goshazakagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazakagrosh毛|gokishazakagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazakagromu|shazakagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazakagnkromu|goshazakagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazakagromu|gokishazakagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazakagmun眉|shazakagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazakagnkmun眉|goshazakagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazakagmun眉|gokishazakagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazakagmush毛|shazakagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazakagnkmush毛|goshazakagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazakagmush毛|gokishazakagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazakagmuro|shazakagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazakagnkmuro|goshazakagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazakagmuro|gokishazakagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
